[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110001100 5
1 0110011001 5
2 0011011111 7
3 1100110000 4
4 1110101100 6
5 1111111110 9
6 1111011010 7
7 1101111111 9
